idea-plugin.name: OpenCode Bridge
idea-plugin.description:
OpenCode Bridge connects your JetBrains IDE to the OpenCode AI coding assistant running in the terminal.

With OpenCode Bridge, you can launch OpenCode with a single click from the toolbar or with Ctrl+Esc, and let it see what's happening in your IDE through an integrated MCP server. OpenCode gets live access to your editor context without you having to copy-paste file contents or error messages.

Features

  • One-click OpenCode launch from the main toolbar or Tools menu (Ctrl+Esc)
  • OpenCode sees IDE diagnostics, your current selection, and file contents via MCP
  • Bearer-token authenticated MCP server, auto-starts when you open a project
  • Built-in detection of the opencode CLI with a helpful message if it's missing

Requires the opencode CLI to be installed on your system.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
• 0.2.0 — MCP server with get_diagnostics / get_selection / read_file tools, bearer-token auth, and unit tests. Build pinned to JDK 17 and corrected IntelliJ platform API usage.
  • 0.1.0 — Initial release: toolbar launch, MCP server scaffolding.
